message:
bd-1l0g9: 80x24 help overlay legibility + snapshot tests

Add compact help overlay modes for both MermaidShowcaseScreen and
MermaidMegaShowcaseScreen at small terminal sizes. Mega showcase
truncates long help content with "... more below" indicator.
Add 80x24 help overlay snapshot tests for both screens.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+┌────────────╭─ Help (? to close) ────────────────────────────────╮────────────┐
+│ Tier:auto G│                                                    │Palette:defa│
+│            │ Navigation                                         │            │
+│            │  j / Down        Next sample                       │            │
+│            │  k / Up          Previous sample                   │            │
+└────────────│  Tab             Select next node                  │────────────┘
+┌ Flow Basic │  S-Tab           Select previous node              │────────────┐
+│            │  /               Enter search mode                 │            │
+│            │                                                    │            │
+│            │ Render Config                                      │            │
+│            │  t               Cycle tier (Auto/Compact/Normal/R │            │
+│            │  g               Toggle glyph mode (Unicode/ASCII) │            │
+│            │  b               Cycle render mode (Auto/Cell/Brai │            │
+│            │  s               Toggle styles (classDef/style)    │            │
+│            │  w               Cycle wrap mode (None/Word/Char/W │            │
+│            │  l               Cycle layout mode (Dense/Normal/S │            │
+│            │  r               Force relayout                    │            │
+│            │  p / P           Cycle palette forward / backward  │            │
+│            │                                                    │            │
+│            │ Viewport                                           │            │
+│            │  + / =           Zoom in                           │            │
+└────────────│  -               Zoom out                          │────────────┘
+NORMAL  j/k:s│  0               Reset zoom (+ clear pan)          │an []/{}:size
+             ╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯             
\ No newline at end of file
